name: blogger
description: Reads Blogger (Google Blogger API v3) blogs, posts, pages, and comments using an OAuth 2.0 refresh-token grant. Read-only.

risk.read: external Blogger API read of blog/post/page/comment metadata
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/paritytest/blogger (the AuthHook's real OAuth2 refresh-grant path) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real token_url and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
